description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND a Live Peacock game is on the schedule
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to a Live Peacock game tile in the Games Carousel
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team>, <away_team_runs> Runs at <home_team>, <home_team_runs> Runs, <away_team>, <away_team_wins> Wins, <away_team_losses> Losses, <home_team>, <home_team_wins> Wins, <home_team_losses> Losses, LIVE, <half_inning>, Blacked Out, Watch on Peacock, Pitching <pitcher>, <pitcher_innings_pitched> Innings Pitched, <pitcher_ERA> Earned Run Average, Hitting <hitter>, <x_of_y> Hitting Today, <season_average> Season Batting Average, <men_on_base>, <number_of_outs>. Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to navigate to a new item. Move up or down to browse new content."
